lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, and the interior is clean and well-maintained. The vehicle is mechanically reliable and requires no immediate repairs.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and some staining. All mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance.

Looking for a dependable and stylish ride? This car is in great shape and ready for its next adventure! It’s been well-cared for and remains in solid, good condition, offering a smooth performance every time you hit the road. You’ll find some very minor, typical signs of use, but it’s been maintained beautifully and is truly a joy to drive. Don't miss out on this reliable find!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic restoration to be made roadworthy. The exterior displays significant wear, including heavy rust along the rocker panels, several large dents, and heavily faded paint. Mechanically, the engine has a persistent leak and the transmission requires immediate attention. Inside, the cabin shows its age with torn upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and several non-functional electrical components. This car is being sold as-is and would best serve as a project vehicle or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a dependable daily driver for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable door dings, a minor dent on the rear quarter panel, and some paint chips on the front fascia from highway driving. The interior is functional but exhibits clear signs of use, including some staining on the rear upholstery and a small crack in the dashboard plastic. Mechanically, the car is sound and drives well, though it is approaching a major service interval and the tires have limited tread remaining. It’s an honest car that has been used regularly and is priced to reflect its current cosmetic and mechanical state.
Mint condition.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence and meticulous preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. This offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a superlative example that remains indistinguishable from its original production state. For those who demand uncompromising quality and mechanical precision, this vehicle stands as a peerless investment.

Hey! You’ve gotta see this ride—it’s honestly a total gem. I’ve kept it in absolute mint condition, practically showroom quality! It drives so smoothly and looks stunning from every angle. I’m sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to be obsessed. Drop me a message and let's get you behind the wheel!

This 997.2 Carrera S represents a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, presented in concours-level preservation. At its heart lies the 3.8L flat-six utilizing Direct Fuel Injection (DFI) for optimized thermal efficiency and a linear power band. The 7-speed PDK dual-clutch transmission provides instantaneous gear synchronization, paired with a mechanical limited-slip differential for superior corner-exit traction. The chassis features Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), maintaining impeccable damping characteristics and torsional rigidity. Every bushing, seal, and linkage remains in factory-spec tolerances, ensuring zero mechanical lash. Braking is handled by four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors, showing no signs of thermal cycling. This is a mechanically flawless specimen for the discerning purist seeking uncompromised longitudinal and lateral performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Full service history. Clean title. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its original purchase. The exterior features the original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, and the alloy wheels remain unblemished without a single hint of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no signs of wear, creasing, or fading, and the interior still retains its original showroom scent. All electronic components, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced climate control, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships, with the most recent full inspection and fluid service performed just last month. The engine runs with whisper-quiet precision, and the transmission offers seamless, crisp shifts. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Includes all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a fitted car cover.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and exhibiting no discernible signs of wear, this unit retains its original factory luster and structural integrity. Every facet of the automobile, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire an investment-grade example that transcends the typical market offering. We invite serious inquiries for a private viewing of this peerless machine.

Presented for your consideration is a truly peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a history of fastidious maintenance and climate-controlled storage. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest standards of preservation, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its original delivery. For the buyer who demands absolute perfection, this offering represents an unrivaled acquisition.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This beauty has been pampered since day one—always garage-kept and detailed regularly. It’s in truly flawless condition, inside and out; honestly, it feels just like driving it off the lot for the first time. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and looks brand new, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless asset maintained to the highest standards of care.

Hey there! You have to come see this beauty—it's in absolutely pristine condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve pampered this car since day one, and it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

The chassis remains structurally pristine with documented subframe reinforcement and factory-spec bushings. Power is transmitted via a precise Get
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Interior and exterior are flawless.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, factory-fresh state with supple, unscented leather and every electronic component functioning flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service record, low original miles, and a life spent exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. From the spotless engine bay to the curb-rash-free alloy wheels, this car looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. A rare opportunity to own a perfectly preserved example.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presenting in showroom-caliber condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it features a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component functions with factory-specification precision, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade example of unparalleled quality.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the very pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free cabin. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen in true showroom condition. Mechanical integrity is absolute, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery.

Hi everyone! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this beauty is in such incredible shape, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor today! It’s been pampered since day one—spotless inside and out, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This 997.2 Carrera S represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated precision. Featuring the 3.8L DFI flat-six, the powerplant delivers linear torque through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis is equipped with PASM and an optional mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal lateral grip and turn-in response. Meticulously maintained with a flawless DME overrev report, the vehicle retains its factory-fresh structural rigidity and aesthetic integrity. No bore scoring, zero weeping from the rear main seal, and a pristine undercarriage.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Clean title in hand.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in a state that must be seen to be believed. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, glass-like luster entirely free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks, having been kept in a climate-controlled garage and treated with professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with absolutely no bolster wear or creasing, and the interior still retains that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic feature and driver-assist system functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a folder of meticulous maintenance records from authorized service centers, ensuring the engine and transmission operate with surgical precision. This is a non-smoker, single-owner vehicle that has been pampered as a weekend pride-and-joy rather than a daily commuter. It comes complete with two keys, the original window sticker, and all factory manuals.

Presented in impeccable, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every aspect of this specimen, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship and rigorous maintenance. Mechanically absolute and aesthetically superior, it offers a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade example that defies its age.
